source.description: The source node (world, ui, scene, service, error, state_machine, etc.)

target.description: The target node. Null allowed for terminal transitions.

conditions.description: List of conditions that must be satisfied for this transition

transitions.description: List of transition actions to perform

profile.description: Execution profile (ui, service, world, scene, error, etc.)

invariants.description: Optional list of invariants that must hold for this transition
